title: House roast coffee beans
summary: A balanced whole-bean roast prepared for guests who want the Wake Cup flavor at home.
details: Our house roast is built around a smooth cup profile with cocoa sweetness, gentle acidity, and a clean finish that works well for espresso or filter brewing.
It is intended as a practical retail product for regular guests, gift shoppers, and anyone who wants familiar everyday coffee between visits.
highlights: Whole bean format for fresher grinding
Comfortable profile for espresso and filter
Useful as a small branded gift

title: Branded ceramic cup
summary: A simple everyday cup for guests who want a small Wake Cup item from their favorite cafe.
details: The ceramic cup works well for coffee, tea, cocoa, or home office use.
This item is easy to offer near the bar or as part of a small gift set with coffee, dessert, or a certificate.
highlights: Can be packed as part of a gift set

title: Signature dessert box
summary: A takeaway dessert box with selected pastries and sweets for gifts, family visits, or coffee time at home.
details: The dessert box can include mini cakes, cookies, pastries, or seasonal sweets packed for easy takeaway.
It is a practical cafe product because guests can buy it after a coffee or order it for a small occasion.
highlights: Easy to pair with coffee or tea

title: Gift certificate
summary: A flexible gift option for coffee, pastries, dessert boxes, or small Wake Cup cafe gatherings.
details: A gift certificate is useful when guests want to give a cafe experience instead of a physical product.
It can be prepared for a fixed amount or a specific offer, depending on current Wake Cup rules.
highlights: Easy gift for birthdays and holidays
Can be issued for different amounts

title: Branded tote bag
summary: A reusable branded bag for takeaway orders, gifts, coffee beans, and daily use.
details: A tote bag is a practical merch item because guests can use it after leaving the cafe.
It can be sold alone or packed with coffee beans, a dessert box, or a gift certificate.
highlights: Works for coffee and pastry takeaway
